name: Eagle Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Buttermilk or strong cold coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt chocolate with water over low heat and set aside.
2. Cream butter with sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Mix in melted chocolate and vanilla extract.
5. Sift flour with baking soda together.
6. Add dry ingredients alternately with buttermilk or coffee to the chocolate mixture; mix until smooth.
7. Beat egg whites with salt until very stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
9. Spread batter evenly into three 8-inch or 9-inch round cake pans lined with wax paper.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes.
11. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes before removing the cakes.
